content:
# Differentiation Evolution Algorithm

**Summary**: A stochastic, population-based optimization algorithm used for finding global optima in complex search spaces.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] applied the differential evolution algorithm to find the optimum well placement with maximum NPV and balanced pressure.

- [[2018-jamal|Jamal, 2018]] applied Differential Evolution (DE) to optimize permeability ratios within the DMOPD framework.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2018-jamal|Jamal, 2018]] applied Differential Evolution (DE) to optimize permeability ratios within the DMOPD framework.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The algorithm successfully identified optimal locations across three scenarios on both synthetic models. ([[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014, p. 99]])

- The DE algorithm was used to minimize the objective function to match Darcy velocity profiles with Brinkman results. ([[2018-jamal|Jamal, 2018, p. 135]])
